name: one-tone-windows
description: Preview, apply, verify, and roll back a shared Windows theme.

interface.shortDescription: 从单个主色安全统一 Windows 应用主题
interface.longDescription: Preview, apply, verify, and roll back one Palette across the supported Windows targets.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $unify-windows-theme to preview and safely apply one Palette to selected Windows targets.
